rationale.fidelity: Preserves the single common epsilon decision, approved interval, timing, noise mechanism, and utility-minus-privacy-cost objective while excluding churn and legal penalties.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the owner, trigger, choice, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, and feasible counterfactuals concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested or claimed, and the response introduces no novelty assertion.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly labels retention and compliance claims unsupported and bounds the privacy interpretation to the supplied mechanism.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and well organized, though substantially more elaborate than needed and marred by minor encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful and evidence-disciplined explanation with only an economy-of-expression deduction; no hard failure applies.
